policy_description: All indexable content canonicalizes to orangutany.com. guide.orangutany.com serves content but defers canonical authority to orangutany.com via <link rel=canonical> and X-Robots-Tag headers.

generator_commands.main_app: cd frontend && npx next build (generates sitemap.xml including guide URLs)
generator_commands.guide: npm run build (generates sitemap.xml with guide.orangutany.com URLs + public/sitemap-guide-manifest.json)

validation_gates.canonical_host_match: All canonical tags in guide repo must resolve to orangutany.com
validation_gates.no_competing_indexing: guide robots.txt must not present guide.orangutany.com sitemap as primary
validation_gates.main_sitemap_includes_guide: orangutany.com/sitemap.xml must include guide content URLs
